query:
SELECT
            f.rowid AS "book_id!: i64",
            b.title AS "title!: String",
            f.rank  AS "rank!: f64"
         FROM books_fts f
         INNER JOIN books b ON b.book_id = f.rowid
         WHERE f.books_fts MATCH ?
           AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
         ORDER BY f.rank
         LIMIT ?
